bundles.title: AeroDrop — Autonomous AI Delivery
bundles.description: Premium mobile UI for an autonomous AI delivery app. Obsidian Liquid Glass aesthetic: 3D isometric pathfinding map with animated flight path, AI agent status card with glowing pulse effects and cycling telemetry phases (PATHFINDING→SCANNING→COORDINATING), dual glass sliders for Priority and Stealth Mode. Design tokens in tokens.css. Follows Apple HIG 2026.

bundles.title: Agentic Ops — Swarm Console
bundles.description: Futuristic desktop dashboard for monitoring 50+ autonomous AI agents. Cyber-Minimalism: mono-chromatic silver palette, sharp 4px corners, real 3D force-directed graph (Fruchterman-Reingold, auto-rotating, depth fog), custom radial knobs for Reasoning Depth and Token Budget. Typography: Chakra Petch with wide letter-spacing + JetBrains Mono for telemetry.

bundles.title: BioPulse — AI Health Tracker
bundles.description: AI-powered health tracking mobile UI with liquid glass aesthetic. Animated biometric rings, health score panels, and activity timeline. Deep purple radial wash background, frosted glass cards, neon health indicators.

bundles.title: Luxar Vault — AI Crypto Wallet
bundles.description: Interactive AI-powered crypto wallet with Holographic Glassmorphism. Iridescent hue shifts (cyan→magenta→violet), deep navy cosmos background, real-time risk analysis slider that retints the entire UI (green→amber→red via CSS custom property), card-based asset list, fuzzy-search bar, and Smart Swap interface with motion-ready buttons. Space Grotesk + JetBrains Mono.

bundles.title: Orchestrator — LogicChain
bundles.description: AI workflow orchestration dashboard. Monochrome industrial aesthetic: pipeline graph, agent node editor, execution log panel, and status matrix. 4px baseline grid, hairline borders, JetBrains Mono throughout.

bundles.title: NeuralStore — Engineered for Signal
bundles.description: Editorial e-commerce for precision audio/video hardware. Monochrome light mode: stark white/black grid, JetBrains Mono product codes, AI assistant panel (Atlas), hero typography at display scale. Six instruments, zero noise.

bundles.title: Frontier — The AI-native IDE
bundles.description: Landing page for an AI-native code editor. Monochrome dark: editor chrome mockup, feature grid, animated code completion preview, terminal gradient footer. Inter Tight + JetBrains Mono. CTA-optimised layout.

bundles.title: VisionSynth — AI Video Generator
bundles.description: Pro-grade desktop UI for an AI video generator. Bento Grid layout: cinematic preview window with dynamic glow backlighting, multi-track timeline with magnetic snapping, floating style-preset cards, Frame Interpolation and Style Intensity sliders. Instrument Serif editorial typeface + Space Grotesk + JetBrains Mono. Amber gold accent on deep oklch purple.

bundles.title: SpectraChat — AI-Native Chat Interface
bundles.description: Production-grade AI chat UI with dark Liquid Glass aesthetic. Conversation sidebar with glass panels, main chat thread with glass message bubbles (assistant left, user right), inline code blocks with oklch syntax highlighting, streaming badge, animated typing indicator, and model selector showing Claude Opus 4. Space Grotesk + JetBrains Mono.

bundles.title: CrystalPay — AI Payment Dashboard
bundles.description: Ultra-premium AI-powered payment dashboard with Liquid Glass aesthetic. Hero balance card with shimmer overlay showing $24,891.50, quick action glass pills, Atlas AI insight panel detecting $89/mo recurring savings, 7-row transaction history, CSS-only spending bar chart, and category breakdown with glass progress bars. Warm wash background.

bundles.title: TradePulse — Trading Terminal
bundles.description: Professional crypto/stock trading terminal. Monochrome dark: 8-ticker watchlist (BTC/ETH/SOL/AAPL/NVDA/MSFT/SPY/QQQ), 48-candle SVG candlestick chart with gridlines and price crosshair, 8+8 order book with depth-bar visualization, 4 open positions with P&L. Bloomberg meets Dieter Rams. JetBrains Mono throughout, Chakra Petch headers.

bundles.title: ShipTrack — Logistics Operations Center
bundles.description: Shipment tracking operations dashboard. Monochrome: header with 247 active routes live indicator, sidebar with nav and key metrics (94.2% on-time), 4 stat cards, 8-row shipments table with tracking IDs/routes/carriers/status badges, CSS bar chart for carrier performance, and route exceptions list. One green accent for live status only.
